---
title: "Featured Work"
---

## Featured Work
### Teaching Students How to Better Manage Natural Resources (2025)
**Featured by the University of Texas at Arlington**
UTA highlighted work connected to our NSF-funded project supporting undergraduate learning about water resources management, decision-making, and game theory through the redesign of **ENVR 2316: Conservation of Natural Resources**.
The project explores how students learn to reason about shared natural resources, stakeholder perspectives, and evidence-based environmental decision-making.
[Read the UTA feature](https://www.uta.edu/news/news-releases/2025/10/13/teaching-students-how-to-better-manage-natural-resources)
